text.title: GitHub Copilot Workspace Four-Gate Pipeline Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Human clicks Next on every gate without editing. Diff drifts; reviewer sees nothing different from a one-shot prompt.
antipattern.root-cause: Edit step not enforced as a real interaction.
antipattern.fix: Track per-gate edit deltas; flag PRs where every gate passed without an edit (likely rubber-stamp).

antipattern.symptom: Agent opens PR directly via API, skipping Workspace. Reviewers lose the spec/plan trail.
antipattern.root-cause: No CI check requiring Workspace metadata in the PR.
antipattern.fix: Add a required check that rejects PRs without `Workspace:` metadata block.

antipattern.symptom: Every typo PR goes through 4 gates. Team velocity tanks.
antipattern.root-cause: Workspace required globally regardless of scope.
antipattern.fix: Allow trivial: prefix to bypass when LoC ≤ 50 and files ≤ 1.
